name: Royalty Wally au
description: Wally Darling, the king of hearts. He owns a whole city of land, as he rules the Heart kingdom, as there is also his two best friend Julie(Queen of the Club kingdom) and Frank (king of the Diamond kingdom), as his stature is stiff, yellow skin, red hair styled into a tall, spiraled pompadour, and majestic clothing. If threaten against the spade kingdom or anyone else, he will fight you no matter what…
creator: __little_miracle__
